btn_actions: What do you want to do?
form_label_model_prompt: Prompt (use {{schema}} to add the model schema to the prompt)
form_descrition_layout_distribution: How do you want to duplicate the regions?
form_descrition_layout_limit: On which part of the collection?
form_description_create_collection: Create a new collection from your selection.
form_description_select_model: Select an existing data model (.json file).
form_label_prompt_mistral: Mistral prompt (leave blank to use the default prompt - use {{schema}} to add the model schema)
form_collection_name_already_exists: A collection with this name already exists
title_contact: A bug, an idea, contact us!
title_pdf_in_folder: PDF files in the selected folder:
error_404_manifest: Error 404 - manifest not found. Please check the URL: {{url}}
error_403_manifest: Error 403 - you do not have permission to access the manifest. Please check the URL: {{url}}
error_ark_invalid: The ARK identifier must contain only numbers and letters
error_invalid_manifest_input: The entered value is neither a URL, an ARK identifier, nor manifest content.
error_manifest_not_found_storage: Manifest not found in your browser storage.
error_image_not_found: Canvas does not contain an image
error_id_collection_invalid: Oops! The collection ID is invalid!
error_export_collection_not_found: Collection to export does not exist
error_export_no_text: No text found. Did you run OCR on this corpus?
error_no_export_format_selected: No export format selected. Please select at least one.
error_import_not_a_manifest: The imported file is not a valid IIIF manifest
error_import_not_a_collection: The json file {{file}} is not a valid Corpusense collection
error_import_collection_already_exists: A collection with ID {{id}} already exists. Import cancelled.
error_no_mistral_key: You do not have a Mistral API key.
error_unsupported_file_type: Unsupported file type. Please use a file of type: {{types}}.
error_mode_name_exists: A model with the name {{name}} already exists.
error_model_undefined: No data model is associated with this collection. Please select one in the collection details form.
error_fs_access_not_supported: The File System Access API is not supported by your browser. Try another browser (Chrome or Edge).
error_fsfile_not_found: The local source (id = {{id}}) was not added to Corpusense.
error_fsfolder_not_found: The local directory ({{name}}) was not added to Corpusense.
error_task_invalid_scope: This process has an invalid scope.
info_drawer_description: You can open a manifest in several ways: by using the manifest URL (in the form http://.../manifest.json), by using its ARK identifier (in the form ark:/12148/cb12345678), or by pasting the manifest content in the designated field.
info_history_drawer_description: List of recently opened manifests. You can reopen them by clicking on the URL.
info_contact_drawer_description: Whether you've found a bug, want to suggest an improvement, or just want to follow Corpusense news, feel free to write to us using this small form. We read you carefully!
info_start_analysis: Which process do you want to start?
info_worker_running: No action available. A process is running on this collection.
info_empty_model: This data model contains no fields.
info_preview_model: Preview of the active data model
info_duplicate_menu: Apply the regions of the current page to other pages
info_not_connected_description: Log in to access all Corpusense features.
info_there_is_no_worker: There is no process linked to this collection.
info_worker_completed_with_error: A process has just finished with errors
info_no_model_selected: No data model is associated with this collection. Please select one in the collection details form.
info_experimental_features: Experimental features. These features are under active development and may be unstable.
info_reset_indexeddb: Resetting IndexedDB is irreversible and will result in the loss of all Corpusense data stored in this browser (collections, models, etc.).
description_import_collection: Import a collection (JSON file) or a set of collections (ZIP file)
description_create_collection: Create a collection by entering the collection name.
description_login: Log in to access all Corpusense features.
description_worker_drawer: Here you will find the list of ongoing or completed processes. You can resume an unfinished process by clicking the 'Resume' button.
description_remove_annotations: Select the types of annotations to delete:
description_delete_collection: Are you sure you want to delete this collection? This action is irreversible and will also delete all associated processes.
description_delete_worker: Are you sure you want to delete this process? This action is irreversible and will also delete all associated results.
description_delete_model: Are you sure you want to delete this model? This action is irreversible
description_delete_datafield: Are you sure you want to delete this field? This action is irreversible
description_delete_converted_file: Are you sure you want to remove the document from Corpusense? This action is irreversible. Warning! This will not delete the documents from your hard drive.
description_local_manifest: Select a folder containing either a pdf or one or more images (jpg, png, tiff). Corpusense will generate a IIIF manifest from these files.
description_select_pdf: Select a PDF file to extract pages and generate a manifest
description_worker_scope_all: This process can be applied to all pages of the collection or to pages one by one. What do you prefer?
toast_element_removed: An element was removed from the collection
toast_one_element_added: An element was added to the collection
toast_multiple_elements_added: {{count}} elements were added to the collection
toast_indexeddb_cleared: IndexedDB reset: all Corpusense data has been deleted from this browser.
toast_collection_offline: The collection is now available offline. You can access it without an internet connection.
toast_collection_online: The collection is only available online. You must be connected to access it.
log_pdf_loaded: PDF loaded successfully. Number of pages: {{numPages}}
